data.name: 極品采花郎
data.detailed_description:
更多資訊

歡迎加入

  • Discord

了解更多遊戲資訊.


關於此遊戲

故事：

你扮演的主角穿越到了異世界的一家醫館雜役鐵柱的身上。為了返回現世，你需要達成一些特殊條件。

在達成條件的過程中，你將與美女們朝夕相處一段時日。期間你會瞭解她們的故事，滿足她們的需求，逐漸深入地發展親密關係。

遊戲特色

◆ 多位可攻略的女性角色
◆ 豐富的親密動作設計
◆ 擬真的自然環境，精心設計的全3D國風世界
◆ 動態光影，晝夜變化
◆ 豐富的系統，游泳、採集、採礦、伐木、種植等
◆ 特色玩法“調教”快速培養親密度
data.about_the_game:
故事：

你扮演的主角穿越到了異世界的一家醫館雜役鐵柱的身上。為了返回現世，你需要達成一些特殊條件。

在達成條件的過程中，你將與美女們朝夕相處一段時日。期間你會瞭解她們的故事，滿足她們的需求，逐漸深入地發展親密關係。

遊戲特色

◆ 多位可攻略的女性角色
◆ 豐富的親密動作設計
◆ 擬真的自然環境，精心設計的全3D國風世界
◆ 動態光影，晝夜變化
◆ 豐富的系統，游泳、採集、採礦、伐木、種植等
◆ 特色玩法“調教”快速培養親密度
data.short_description: 《極品採花郎》是一款中國古風戀愛模擬遊戲。玩家透過情節的發展，在遊戲中逐步與各色美女培養感情，進而漸漸發展出愈來愈深入的親密關係。過程中，可進行採集、製作、建造、種植等行為推進遊戲進程；更有特色玩法“調教”可與美女互動。
data.supported_languages: 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 英文, 泰文, 越南文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7+
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5 4590
  • 記憶體: 12 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX 970 or GTX 1060 or better/ AMD R9 290 or better
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 8 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7+
  • 處理器: Intel i5 6500, AMD Ryzen 3-1200 or above
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX 1060 6GB, AMD RX570 or above
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 8 GB 可用空間

data.name: Romantic Escapades
data.detailed_description:
More information

Welcome to join Discord for more information about the game.


About the Game

Story:

The protagonist you play travels to Tiezhu, a handyman in a medical clinic in a different world. In order to return to the present world, you need to meet some special conditions.

In the process of fulfilling the conditions, you will spend some time with the beauties day and night. During this period, you will understand their stories, meet their needs, and gradually develop an intimate relationship in depth.

Game features


◆ Rich intimate action design
◆ Realistic natural environment, carefully designed full 3D Chinese style world.
◆ Dynamic light and shadow, day and night changes
◆ Rich systems, swimming, gathering, mining, logging, planting, relaxing the meridians and activating collaterals, etc.
◆ The special gameplay of "Relaxing the Meridians and Revitalizing the collaterals" quickly cultivates intimacy
data.about_the_game:
Story:

The protagonist you play travels to Tiezhu, a handyman in a medical clinic in a different world. In order to return to the present world, you need to meet some special conditions.

In the process of fulfilling the conditions, you will spend some time with the beauties day and night. During this period, you will understand their stories, meet their needs, and gradually develop an intimate relationship in depth.

Game features

data.short_description: "Romantic Escapades" is an ancient Chinese love simulation game. Through the development of the plot, players gradually develop relationships with various beauties in the game, and then gradually develop deeper and deeper intimate relationships.
data.supported_languages: Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, English, Thai, Vietnamese, Spanish - Spain

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: Windows 7+
  • Processor: Intel Core i5 4590
  • Memory: 12 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GTX 970 or GTX 1060 or better/ AMD R9 290 or better
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 8 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: Windows 7+
  • Processor: Intel i5 6500, AMD Ryzen 3-1200 or above
  • Memory: 16 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GTX 1060 6GB, AMD RX570 or above
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 8 GB available space
